title: chenopodium × mediterraneum
intro: Chenopodium × mediterraneum, also known as Mediterranean goosefoot, is a hybrid species of the Chenopodium genus, combining characteristics of Chenopodium album and Chenopodium murale. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chenopodium × mediterraneum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of conditions, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
